arts.ttl: Jules Kounde accepts blame as Barcelona slip at Celta Vigo
arts.sum: Barcelona star Jules Kounde fronted up over his mistake in their 2-2 La Liga draw at Celta Vigo. The Catalans missed the chance to extend their lead at the top of the table as they gave up a two-goal lead in the final five minutes in Vigo.
